title: WebSocket Message Contracts
description: JSON Schema definitions for all WebSocket message types in the Nexus Backend API

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for authentication

sendVoiceInput.description: Whether the client can send voice input

sendTextInput.description: Whether the client can send text input

receiveVoiceOutput.description: Whether the client wants to receive voice output

receiveTranscriptionUpdates.description: Whether the client wants to receive intermediate transcription updates for voice input and output

receiveEvents.description: Whether the client wants to receive all conversation events (e.g. turn start/end, agent actions)

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for authentication response

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for the automatically created session

acceptVoice.description: Whether conversations can accept voice input

settings.description: ASR-specific settings including model, language preferences, etc.

language.description: The language code for speech recognition (e.g., "en-US")

dictionaryPhrases.description: The phrases to add to the speech recognition dictionary

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition (e.g., "pcm_16000")

unintelligiblePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text to use when speech is unintelligible or cannot be transcribed

voiceActivityDetection.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection to automatically start/stop recording based on speech presence

asrConfig.description: ASR configuration settings with full ASR settings

acceptVoice.description: Whether conversations can accept voice input

settings.description: ASR-specific settings including model, language preferences, etc.

language.description: The language code for speech recognition (e.g., "en-US")

dictionaryPhrases.description: The phrases to add to the speech recognition dictionary

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition (e.g., "pcm_16000")

unintelligiblePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text to use when speech is unintelligible or cannot be transcribed

voiceActivityDetection.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection to automatically start/stop recording based on speech presence

asrConfig.description: ASR configuration settings with full ASR settings

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for starting a new conversation

sessionId.description: Session ID in which to start the conversation

personaId.description: Optional persona ID for the conversation

stageId.description: Stage ID to initiate the conversation at a specific stage

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for start conversation response

conversationId.description: Unique identifier for the created conversation

error.description: Error message if conversation creation failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for resuming a conversation

sessionId.description: Session ID in which to resume the conversation

conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the conversation to resume

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for resume conversation response

conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the resumed conversation

error.description: Error message if conversation resumption failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for ending a conversation

conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the conversation to end

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for end conversation response

error.description: Error message if conversation termination failed

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for conversation events

inputTurnId.description: Identifier of the input turn associated with the event, if applicable

outputTurnId.description: Identifier of the output turn associated with the event, if applicable

type.description: Effect type

reason.description: Optional reason for ending the conversation

type.description: Effect type

reason.description: Optional reason for aborting the conversation

type.description: Effect type

stageId.description: ID of the stage to switch to

type.description: Effect type

code.description: JavaScript code to execute in isolated context

type.description: Effect type

template.description: Template to render and replace user input with

type.description: Effect type

variableName.description: Name of the variable to modify

operation.description: Operation to perform: set (assign value), reset (clear value), add (append to array), remove (remove from array)

value.description: Value for the operation (not used for reset operation)

modifications.description: Array of variable modifications to apply

type.description: Effect type

fieldName.description: Name of the profile field to modify

operation.description: Operation to perform: set (assign value), reset (clear value), add (append to array), remove (remove from array)

value.description: Value for the operation (not used for reset operation)

modifications.description: Array of user profile field modifications to apply

type.description: Effect type

toolId.description: ID of the tool to call

parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the tool

type.description: Effect type

headers.description: HTTP headers to send with the request

resultKey.description: Key name to store the webhook result under in context.results.webhooks

type.description: Effect type

eventData.description: Data associated with the conversation event

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for starting user voice input

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for start user voice input response

success.description: Whether voice input was successfully started

error.description: Error message if voice input start failed

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for sending user voice chunk

ordinal.description: Sequential order of this chunk in the voice input sequence

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for send user voice chunk response

success.description: Whether voice chunk was successfully received

error.description: Error message if voice chunk processing failed

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for ending user voice input

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for end user voice input response

success.description: Whether voice input was successfully ended

error.description: Error message if voice input ending failed

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for sending user text input

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for send user text input response

success.description: Whether text input was successfully received

error.description: Error message if text input processing failed

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn, can be used to correlate with voice input if applicable

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for user text chunk

inputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the input turn this chunk belongs to

chunkId.description: Unique identifier for this text chunk

chunkText.description: Chunk of transcribed text input from the user

ordinal.description: Sequential order of this chunk in the transcription sequence

isFinal.description: Whether this is the final version of the chunk of text input

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for navigating to a stage

stageId.description: Unique identifier of the target stage

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for go to stage response

success.description: Whether navigation to the stage was successful

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for setting a variable

variableName.description: Name of the variable to set

variableValue.description: Value to set for the variable (can be any JSON-serializable type)

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for set variable response

success.description: Whether the variable was successfully set

error.description: Error message if setting the variable failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for getting a variable

variableName.description: Name of the variable to retrieve

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for get variable response

success.description: Whether the variable was successfully retrieved

variableValue.description: Value of the variable (undefined if not found)

error.description: Error message if retrieving the variable failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for getting all variables

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for get all variables response

success.description: Whether the variables were successfully retrieved

variables.description: Map of variable names to their values

error.description: Error message if retrieving variables failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for running an action

actionName.description: Name of the global action to execute

parameters.description: Array of parameters to pass to the action

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for run action response

success.description: Whether the action was successfully executed

error.description: Error message if action execution failed

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type for calling a tool

toolId.description: Unique identifier of the tool to execute

parameters.description: Map of parameter names to their values

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for call tool response

success.description: Whether the tool was successfully executed

result.description: Result returned by the tool execution

error.description: Error message if tool execution failed

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for starting AI voice output

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for this voice output sequence for correlation

expectVoice.description: Whether the AI response will include voice output

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for sending AI voice chunk

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for this voice output sequence for correlation

audioFormat.description: Audio format of the chunk data

chunkId.description: Unique identifier for this specific audio chunk

ordinal.description: Sequential order of this chunk in the voice output sequence

isFinal.description: Whether this is the final chunk in the voice output sequence

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for ending AI voice output

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for this voice output sequence for correlation

fullText.description: The full text that was converted to speech, if available

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for AI transcribed text chunk

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for the output turn this chunk belongs to

chunkId.description: Unique identifier for this text chunk

chunkText.description: Chunk of transcribed text output from the AI

ordinal.description: Sequential order of this chunk in the transcription sequence

isFinal.description: Whether this is the final chunk of text output

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for sending AI-generated image

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for this output sequence for correlation

mimeType.description: MIME type of the image (e.g., image/png, image/jpeg)

sequenceNumber.description: Sequence number if multiple images in response

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type for sending AI-generated audio

outputTurnId.description: Unique identifier for this output sequence for correlation

mimeType.description: MIME type of the audio (e.g., audio/pcm, audio/mpeg)

sequenceNumber.description: Sequence number if multiple audio blocks in response
